lookingFor.title: What I'm looking for
lookingFor.paragraph1: I work best between technology ecosystems and real-world adoption - building capacity for first-time digital users, designing communication and market linkage strategies for underserved communities, and driving measurable outcomes for government and development-sector programs. Strong in stakeholder alignment, ecosystem orchestration, and scaling digital commerce across diverse user segments.
lookingFor.paragraph2: Open to relocation within India. Available for full-time roles, consulting engagements, and advisory positions across digital public infrastructure, social commerce, MSME enablement, and development-sector programs.

sectionDesc: Open to roles in ecosystem development, social-sector program delivery, digital commerce strategy, and impact-driven communication - in India and internationally.
